session.user:
Run these checks and report results. Do NOT fix anything — just report:
1. ty check on the modified files: - packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py - src/erk/cli/config.py - src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/resolve.py - src/erk/core/codespace_run.py - src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py - src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/plan_cmd.py
2. ruff check on those same files plus the new test files: - tests/unit/cli/test_config_codespace.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_resolve.py - tests/unit/core/codespace/test_codespace_run.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py - tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/test_plan_cmd.py
3. ruff format --check on all those files
Report all output.
session.assistant: I'll run these checks using the devrun agent pattern. Let me execute all three checks.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run ty type checker on modified files

tool_use.name: Bash

Run ruff linter on source and test files

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff format --check packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/context/types.py src/erk/cli...[truncated 332 chars]...space/test_connect_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/run/objective/test_plan_cmd.py

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py:76:101 | 74 | setup_commands = "git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate" 75 | claude_command = "claude --dangerously-skip-permissions" 76 | remote_command = f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{export_prefix}{setup_commands} && {claude_command}'" | ^^^ 77 | 78 | click.echo(f"Connecting to codespace '{codespace.name}'...", err=True) |
E501 Line too long (103 > 100) --> src/erk/core/codespace_run.py:30:101 | 28 | """ 29 | cd_prefix = f"cd {shlex.quote(working_directory)} && " if working_directory is not None else "" 30 | return f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate && {erk_command}'" | ^^^ |
Found 2 errors.

session.assistant:
Here are the results:
## ty check
**ty passed:** All type checks passed!
## ruff check
**ruff failed:** 2 issues found
- **src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py:76:101** - E501 Line too long (103 > 100) ```python remote_command = f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}{export_prefix}{setup_commands} && {claude_command}'" ```
- **src/erk/core/codespace_run.py:30:101** - E501 Line too long (103 > 100) ```python return f"bash -l -c '{cd_prefix}git pull && uv sync && source .venv/bin/activate && {erk_command}'" ```
## ruff format --check

- `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/core/codespace_run.py`
